properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord, I (we) want to take this time Just to praise Your Holy Name, because You’ve been, You've been so good to me So from the rising of the sun, unto the going down of the same Lord, Your Name alone is worthy to be praised

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: (He's) Jehovah Nissi, The Lord our banner Jehovah Rapha, The Lord our healer Jehovah Shalom, The Lord our peace Jehovah Shammah, The Lord is present Jehovah Raah, The Lord our shepherd Jehovah Tsidkenu, The Lord our righteousness Jehovah Shalom, The Lord our peace Jehovah Jireh, He provideth all our needs

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are the great I AM, that I AM The God that was, is, and is to come You are the Prophet, Priest, and King You are the Eagle, Lamb, and Lion Son of Man, Son of God, and Son of David

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You are the Rose of Sharon You’re the Lily of the valley You’re the Bright and Morning Star, that’s what You are You are the Mighty Conqueror, that’s been unconquered by traditions The Lord God, Jesus Christ is His Name
